dataRules.output: Data is scattered across multiple systems, increasing integration complexity.
Lack of structured digital data will require significant manual preparation.
Missing process documentation may hide edge cases and data anomalies.

processRules.output: Low process maturity suggests high variability; standardization is required before AI build.
Low frequency limits the ROI and data gathering opportunities.

valueRules.output: Undefined KPIs make it difficult to measure automation success and ROI.

feasibilityRules.output: High number of system integrations significantly increases technical risk.
